name: PythonPartViewData
summary: Data class with the properties of a PythonPart view

properties.name: end_scale
properties.summary: The scale, to which the view is displayed (scale range's upper limit)

properties.name: ref_pnt1_x
properties.summary: X coordinate of the first resizing point

properties.name: ref_pnt1_y
properties.summary: Y coordinate of the first resizing point

properties.name: ref_pnt1_z
properties.summary: Z coordinate of the first resizing point

properties.name: ref_pnt2_x
properties.summary: X coordinate of the second resizing point

properties.name: ref_pnt2_y
properties.summary: Y coordinate of the second resizing point

properties.name: ref_pnt2_z
properties.summary: Z coordinate of the second resizing point

properties.name: scale_x
properties.summary: Direction, in which the view should be resized, when the whole PythonPart is resized in the X direction.

properties.name: scale_y
properties.summary: Direction, in which the view should be resized, when the whole PythonPart is resized in the Y direction.

properties.name: scale_z
properties.summary: Direction, in which the view should be resized, when the whole PythonPart is resized in the Y direction.

properties.name: start_scale
properties.summary: The scale, from which the view is displayed (scale range's lower limit)

properties.name: visibility_layer_a
properties.summary: Whether the view should be visible on layer A

properties.name: visibility_layer_b
properties.summary: Whether the view should be visible on layer B

properties.name: visibility_layer_c
properties.summary: Whether the view should be visible on layer C

properties.name: visible_in_2d
properties.summary: Whether the view should be visible in the ground view

properties.name: visible_in_3d
properties.summary: Whether the view should be visible in the isometric view
